name: Carmen McRae
abstract: Carmen Mercedes McRae (April 8, 1920 – November 10, 1994) was an American jazz singer. She is considered one of the most influential jazz vocalists of the 20th century and is remembered for her behind-the-beat phrasing and ironic interpretation of lyrics.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Clarke
about_quotes.evidence: Carmen and I were married while I was in training... I'd know Carmen since the '30s, because she lived across the street from me... Carmen and I, when I found out Carmen was a friend of Billie's, that was it, and with Irene. I was right in the crowd. I was one of the gang

about_quotes.speaker: Richard Wyands
about_quotes.evidence: I worked with Carmen McRae... I went on the road with Carmen... I made some things with her around the New York area.
about_quotes.doc_title: Richard Wyands interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 7, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: John Levy
about_quotes.evidence: decided I would take her on... I worked out a thing to send her on the road... I got Ray Bryant to come in and meet with her... to work with me on these things.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Levy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Bryant
about_quotes.evidence: Carmen McRae came to town without a piano player, and I went and filled in with her. And when she left I left with her. I was with her for maybe two years
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Bryant interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Kirchner
about_quotes.evidence: Carmen McRae with Norman Simmons’ trio; ... So this was the bill for one night. And I mean that was the night that basically set me on my career path
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Kirchner interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 4, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gafa
about_quotes.evidence: every time I went on a new job with Carmen she would get into an argument... And so when I left Carmen I got the call for Dizzy.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Gafa interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2023
